StructurePhase.Reference: Puselj M., Schubert K., J. Less-Common Met., v35 p259 (1974)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO2. LPF Collection Code: 450924. Polymorphism: High temperature phase. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Al,Au. Compound Preparation: arc-melted. CRUCIBLE: copper hearth. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Article Title: KRISTALLSTRUKTUREN DER PHASEN Au2Al(h), Au2Al1 - (r) UND Au2Al1 + (r). Temperature of Data Collection: 843 K. Wyckoff Sequence: e a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
